home.tagline: A Concise and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine
home.desc.text1: Even with just a piece of text,
home.desc.text2: can automatically generate a parallel world composed of up to
home.desc.text3: based on the reality seeds within it. Inject variables from a god's-eye view and find the
home.desc.text4: in dynamic environments through complex swarm interactions.
home.desc.slogan: Let the future rehearse among Agents, let decisions prevail after a hundred battles
home.statusDesc: Prediction engine on standby. Upload multiple unstructured data files to initialize simulation sequences.
home.workflow.title: Workflow Sequence
home.workflow.step1.title: Graph Construction
home.workflow.step1.desc: Reality seed extraction & Individual and group memory injection & GraphRAG construction
home.workflow.step2.title: Environment Setup
home.workflow.step2.desc: Entity relationship extraction & Persona generation & Environment config Agent injection of simulation parameters
home.workflow.step3.title: Start Simulation
home.workflow.step3.desc: Dual-platform parallel simulation & Auto-parse prediction requirements & Dynamic temporal memory updates
home.workflow.step4.title: Report Generation
home.workflow.step4.desc: ReportAgent has a rich toolset for deep interaction with the post-simulation environment
home.workflow.step5.title: Deep Interaction
home.workflow.step5.desc: Chat with any individual in the simulated world & Chat with ReportAgent
home.console.uploadTitle: Drag and drop files to upload
home.console.uploadHint: or click to browse file system
home.console.simPlaceholder: // Enter simulation or prediction requirements in natural language (e.g., If university X publishes a notice revoking a disciplinary action, what public opinion trends will it trigger?)
step.label: Step
process.waitingOntologyHint: Graph construction will start automatically after generation completes
process.ontologyApiDesc: After uploading documents, the LLM analyzes document content and automatically generates an ontology structure (entity types + relation types) suitable for public opinion simulation.
process.graphApiDesc: Based on the generated ontology, documents are chunked and the Zep API is called to build a knowledge graph, extracting entities and relationships.
process.waitingForOntologyComplete: Waiting for ontology generation to complete...
process.readyProceed: Ready to proceed to next step
step1.ontologyDesc: LLM analyzes document content and simulation requirements, extracts real-world seeds, and automatically generates appropriate ontology structures
step1.graphBuildDesc: Based on the generated ontology, automatically chunks documents and calls Zep to build a knowledge graph, extracting entities and relations, forming temporal memory and community summaries
step1.buildCompleteDesc: Graph construction is complete. Please proceed to the next step for simulation environment setup.
step2.simInstanceDesc: Create a new simulation instance and fetch simulation world parameter templates
step2.generatePersonasDesc: Combines context to automatically invoke tools that organize entities and relations from the knowledge graph, initialize simulated individuals, and assign them unique behaviors and memories based on real-world seeds
step2.dualPlatformDesc: LLM intelligently configures world time flow, recommendation algorithms, each individual's active time periods, posting frequency, event triggers, and other parameters based on simulation requirements and real-world seeds
step2.initialActivationDesc: Based on the narrative direction, automatically generates initial activation events and trending topics to guide the initial state of the simulated world
step2.prepCompleteDesc: Simulation environment is ready. You can now start running the simulation.
step2.roundSettingsDesc: MiroFish automatically plans to simulate {hours} hours of real time, with each round representing {minutes} minutes of time elapsed
step2.customTip: For first-time runs, it is strongly recommended to switch to 'Custom Mode' and reduce simulation rounds for a quick preview and lower error risk
step5.chatIndividual: Chat with any individual in the world
step5.reportAgentDesc: A quick chat version of the report generation agent, capable of invoking 4 professional tools with full MiroFish memory
step5.tool.insightForgeDesc: Aligns real-world seed data with simulation environment state, combining Global/Local Memory mechanisms for cross-temporal deep attribution analysis
step5.tool.panoramaSearchDesc: Graph-based breadth-first traversal algorithm that reconstructs event propagation paths and captures the topology of complete information flow
step5.tool.quickSearchDesc: GraphRAG-based instant query interface with optimized indexing for quickly extracting specific node attributes and discrete facts
step5.tool.interviewAgentDesc: Autonomous interviews capable of conducting parallel multi-round conversations with simulated individuals to collect unstructured opinion data and psychological states
step5.chatEmpty.reportAgent: Chat with Report Agent to explore report content in depth
step5.chatEmpty.agent: Chat with simulated individuals to understand their views
step5.surveyPlaceholder: Enter the question you want to ask all selected targets...
graph.title: Graph Relationship Visualization
graph.name: Name:
graph.label: Label:
graph.memoryUpdating: GraphRAG long/short-term memory updating in real time
graph.finishedHint: Some content is still processing. Consider refreshing the graph manually later.
history.title: Simulation Records
history.replayHint: Step3 "Start Simulation" and Step5 "Deep Interaction" require a live run and do not support historical replay
